## Web Pages Added
- Terms of Service page with comprehensive legal sections
- Contact Us page with form and multiple contact methods
- FAQ page with search, filtering, and 13 common questions

## Updates
- Updated GitHub links to correct repository (amolood/ana-muslim)
- Unified header/footer across all pages
- Fixed focus mode in Quran Premium page
- Enhanced Quran reading experience with Islamic backgrounds

## Cleanup
- Removed all .tar.gz deployment archives
- Removed all .sh script files
- Removed .env.server file
- Excluded large APK/AAB files from repository
- Cleaned up repository structure

## Features
- All pages use glass morphism design
- Full Arabic/English translation support
- Responsive mobile-first design
- Alpine.js for interactivity
- Search and filtering in FAQ page
- Form validation in contact page
